query: Avatars in ElevenCreative news OR trending OR launch 2026

results.title: Instagram
results.content:
ElevenCreative has launched Avatars, adding a face to its AI voice generation in a single interface.  
  
The workflow is direct. Write a script, select a voice, choose an avatar, and generate a lip-synced talking-head video in one pass. Because the audio and video are generated together, synchronization is tighter than setups that import audio from an external source.  
  
Avatars are persistent identities. You create one from reference photos or a prompt, then reuse it across videos and generate variations across angles, outfits, and settings.  
  
For teams producing at volume, a new Avatar node inside Flows wires avatar generation into automated pipelines, so scripts, voices, and languages can be batch-run from one workflow. [...] ## No comments yet.

results.title: Creator Economy Update: YouTube's $0 Ad Slot + July Rules
results.content:
## Other Things Worth Knowing

ElevenLabs just shipped a talking-head video studio. ElevenLabs launched Avatars inside ElevenCreative, which turns a script plus a chosen voice into a lip-synced talking-head video in one interface, with a node that batch-produces ad variants or localized explainers. It’s on all paid plans now. Daily video without a camera or a crew is no longer a someday thing. If you’ve been sitting out video because filming is the bottleneck, that excuse just got weaker. results.title: Anam vs ElevenLabs Avatars: Which Is Ready for Live AI Conversations?
results.content:
Tags: #virtual-avatars #anam #elevenlabs #avatar-comparison #voice-ai #live-avatars #ai-agents

A

Ajitesh

Tough Tongue AI

Share

## Related Posts

Continue reading more on this topic

The Best Virtual Avatar Solutions in 2026

Resources

### The Best Virtual Avatar Solutions in 2026

A practical, opinionated guide to virtual avatar providers in 2026 (Anam, HeyGen LiveAvatar, Tavus, Avatario), and why the avatar is just one layer. The agent stack around it (engagement tools, data integrations, evaluation, self-improving scenarios) is what turns a talking head into a product.

How Can I Build an AI Meeting Agent? A Practical Guide for Google Meet and Sales Calls

Resources

### How Can I Build an AI Meeting Agent? A Practical Guide for Google Meet and Sales Calls [...] At Tough Tongue AI, we have used Anam in production. Our experience has been strong: low latency, lifelike avatars, and a product shape that fits live AI conversations. ElevenLabs Avatars looks promising for generated talking-head content, but based on its public docs, it is not yet positioned as a production-grade replacement for a real-time avatar provider like Anam.

If you want the full landscape of avatar providers (Anam, HeyGen LiveAvatar, Tavus, Avatario, and others), we cover that in The Best Virtual Avatar Solutions in 2026. This article is a focused, two-player comparison for teams deciding between Anam and ElevenLabs specifically.

## The Short Version [...] All blogs   Resources

By Ajitesh

# Anam vs ElevenLabs Avatars: Which Is Ready for Live AI Conversations?

Anam vs ElevenLabs Avatars: Which Is Ready for Live AI Conversations?

ElevenLabs has entered the avatar market with Avatars in ElevenCreative. That is interesting. ElevenLabs already owns one of the strongest positions in AI voice, and putting a face on that voice is the logical next step.

But for teams building live AI conversations, the important question is not “can this produce a good-looking avatar video?” It is: can this run in production, in real time, with low enough latency that a user forgets they are talking to software?

That is where Anam and ElevenLabs are in very different places today.

results.title: Hasbro Launches Sixth Wall, a New AI Studio Building the Next Generation of Character Experiences | Hasbro
results.content:
# Hasbro Launches Sixth Wall, a New AI Studio Building the Next Generation of Character Experiences

# Hasbro Launches Sixth Wall, a New AI Studio Building the Next Generation of Character Experiences

03 Jun, 2026

PDF Version

Announces Strategic Partnershipwith ElevenLabs andIntroduces Behavioral Licensing, a New Model for Licensing AI Characters

LOS ANGELES--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jun. 3, 2026-- Hasbro, a leading games, IP, and toy company, today launched Sixth Wall, a new AI studio dedicated to bringing iconic characters into the AI era. Alongside the launch, the company announced a strategic partnership with ElevenLabs and introduced Behavioral Licensing, a new category of character licensing designed for dynamic interactions. [...] About ElevenLabs

ElevenLabs is an AI company that transforms how people and businesses communicate with the world. We launched in January 2023 with the first human-like AI voice model. Today, we serve millions of users and thousands of businesses across three main platforms. ElevenAgents enables businesses to deliver seamless and intelligent customer experiences, with the integrations, testing, monitoring, and reliability necessary to deploy voice and chat agents at scale. ElevenCreative empowers creators and marketers to generate and edit speech, music, image, and video across 70+ languages. ElevenAPI gives developers access to our leading AI audio foundational models.

HAS-C

results.title: Stan Lee's Voice Comes to ElevenLabs Platform
results.content:
Technology
 Celebrity
 Entertainment
 News

# ElevenLabs Partners With Stan Lee Universe to Bring Creator's Voice and Likeness to AI Platform

The collaboration includes voice cloning, visual content generation and music features inspired by the comic book creator.

Picture of License Global

License GlobalLicense Global

May 28, 2026

1 Min Read

ElevenLabs has announced a partnership with Stan Lee Universe to bring the voice, likeness and creative spirit of the comic book creator to its platform through voice, image and music features. 

Lee's voice is now available on the ElevenLabs Iconic Marketplace and the Eleven Reader app. The voice clone was created from professional recordings and is designed to capture Lee's narration and storytelling style. [...] Add us now

### Latest Video [...] The partnership includes the launch of the Stan Lee Book of the Month Club inside Eleven Reader, which will feature literature selections. The June selection is "Treasure Island" by Robert Louis Stevenson. ElevenLabs plans to add one public domain work featured in the book club to the platform over the next 12 months. 

Lee's likeness is also coming to the ElevenLabs Creative Templates for a limited time. Users will be able to generate visual content featuring Lee for personal, non-commercial use only, governed by mutually approved safety guidelines. Licensed commercial use of his likeness is available through the Stan Lee Universe team via ElevenLabs.
